channel.title: S3 on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in S3 on ivomarino.com

item.title: S3 Bucket Backups with Restic: Automating Cloud Storage Replication
item.description: S3 buckets aren’t backups. Secure them with independent snapshots using rclone FUSE mounting and restic deduplication. 500GB of production buckets compressed to 100GB with 80% savings. Includes automation, configuration, and real operational procedures for 2-3 hour backup windows.

item.title: Production Backup Strategy: Three Layers of Defense
item.description: Single backup tool doesn’t work at production scale. Learn the three-layer backup architecture combining ZFS snapshots (local fast recovery), Restic backups (offsite immutable), and S3 archives (compliance). Achieves defense-in-depth with 1TB data, point-in-time recovery, and only $50/month cost.

item.title: XtraBackup + S3: Enterprise Database Backup Strategy
item.description: Database backups at TB scale require incremental backups with intelligent chain management. Learn how XtraBackup + S3 storage with chain-aware retention solves point-in-time recovery without the cost of managed backup solutions. Includes automation patterns used in production.
